description_long: This object is a detailed model of a NASA Space Shuttle orbiter, featuring a streamlined white fuselage with black thermal protection tiles along the nose, wing edges, and underbelly. The wings are delta-shaped and low-mounted, with a slight upward angle and black leading edges. The rear of the shuttle displays three large main engines flanked by two smaller orbital maneuvering system pods, as well as a vertical stabilizer with a black tip. The cockpit is located at the forward end, with a series of small, dark windows. The landing gear is visible in the retracted position beneath the fuselage, and the payload bay doors are outlined along the top of the shuttle.
description: A NASA Space Shuttle orbiter with a white fuselage, black-tipped delta wings, and three large rear engines. The cockpit is forward-mounted with dark windows, and the shuttle features detailed surface markings and thermal tiles.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the shuttle's white fuselage, black nose, cockpit windows, and the full span of the delta wings with black leading edges.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the shuttle's length, the retracted landing gear, the black-tipped vertical stabilizer, and the three main engines at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the three large main engines, two smaller maneuvering pods, and the vertical stabilizer.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the shuttle's profile, wing shape, and rear engine configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing delta configuration with slight dihedral angle and black leading edges; no winglets present.
attribute_engine_type: Three rear-mounted jet engines with two additional smaller maneuvering thrusters.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and no horizontal stabilizers visible apart from the wing's trailing edge.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear unit.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with a series of small, dark windows at the nose of the fuselage.
